name: fable-method
description: Installs 'The Fable Way' working discipline for capable models (target: Opus 4.8): a self-contained, auto-triggering method skill plus runner skills (scope, adversarial review, verify, ship) that spawn plain general-purpose subagents with inline prompts. No dependency on any other plugin or skill. Each workspace grows its own git-ignored .fable/project.md overlay (acceptance oracle, conventions, gotchas). Distilled from a forensic study of the Fable model.
